general.call_or_text_desc: How would you like to reach us?

phone.call_desc: Speak with a staff member now
phone.text_desc: Chat with our AI assistant instantly
phone.ai_note: Texting uses our AI assistant — available 24/7

home.philosophy_p1: At MyDojo, we believe martial arts is a vehicle for personal growth. Our programs are designed to not only provide a rigorous physical workout but also to strengthen the mind and spirit.
home.philosophy_p2: Whether you're looking to instill discipline in your child, find a stress-relieving workout for yourself, or learn practical self-defense, our world-class instructors are here to guide you every step of the way.
home.featured_desc: Burn up to 800 calories in a single session! Our high-energy kickboxing classes combine real martial arts techniques with a full-body cardio workout. Perfect for all fitness levels.
home.cta_desc: Join our high-energy, fat-burning 45-minute complimentary Karate or Kickboxing class!
home.enroll_child_desc: Build confidence, focus, and discipline for life.
home.enroll_teen_desc: Develop leadership, respect, and self-defense skills.
home.enroll_myself_desc: Get fit, learn self-defense, and feel unstoppable.
home.enroll_family_desc: Train together, grow together, succeed together.
home.safe_facility_desc: Clean, family-friendly environment with certified instructors.
home.experienced_instructors_desc: Decades of combined martial arts expertise and teaching experience.
home.character_dev_desc: We build confident, respectful, and disciplined young leaders.
home.structured_curriculum_desc: Progressive belt system with clear goals and achievements.
home.fitness_health_desc: Full-body workouts that improve strength, flexibility, and cardio.
home.leadership_desc: Programs designed to develop tomorrow's leaders today.
home.family_env_desc: A welcoming community where every member feels at home.
home.antibullying_desc: Practical tools to handle conflict with confidence and calm.
home.faq_a1: For the first class, comfortable workout clothes (t-shirt and sweatpants/shorts) are perfect. We train barefoot on the mats. If you decide to join, we'll help you get a proper uniform.
home.faq_q2: How old does my child need to be?
home.faq_a2: Our Little Ninjas program starts at age 3! We have programs for every age group from 3 to adults.
home.faq_q3: What styles of martial arts do you teach?
home.faq_a3: We teach a blend of traditional Karate, Kickboxing, and practical self-defense techniques — all adapted for the student's age and level.
home.faq_q4: Do I need experience to start?
home.faq_a4: Absolutely not! All our programs are designed for complete beginners. Our instructors will guide you every step of the way.
home.faq_q5: How often should I attend classes?
home.faq_a5: We recommend 2–3 classes per week for the best results. Consistency is key to progress in martial arts.
home.faq_a6: We offer flexible membership options. The best way to find out is to come in for a FREE trial class — no pressure, no commitment.
home.final_cta_desc: Helping 100 new members start their martial arts journey before July 25.

programs.title: Our Programs
programs.subtitle: Find the Perfect Program for You
programs.little_ninjas_desc: A "stealthy" way to teach children life skills. Helps them enter society with a more confident and enthusiastic outlook.
programs.core_kids_desc: Perfect way to give kids confidence and improve self-discipline. Teaches life skills of self-defense in a fun, safe environment.
programs.teens_adults_desc: Get in the best shape of your life while learning real self-defense. High-energy kickboxing and traditional martial arts.
programs.kickboxing_desc: Burn up to 800 calories per session. High-intensity cardio meets real martial arts technique.
programs.summer_camp_desc: An action-packed summer experience combining martial arts, games, and character development.
programs.private_lessons_desc: One-on-one instruction tailored to your specific goals and skill level.
programs.homeschool_desc: Flexible scheduling for homeschool families. Physical education with character development.
programs.birthday_desc: Unforgettable martial arts birthday parties for kids of all ages.
programs.parents_night_desc: Drop off the kids for a fun-filled evening while you enjoy a night out.
programs.family_desc: Enroll your whole family and unlock exclusive savings — one registration fee covers everyone, and your 2nd family member gets 50% off monthly tuition.
programs.family_50off_desc: Every additional family member enrolls at half the monthly tuition — every month, for the life of their membership.
programs.family_reg_desc: One $99 registration fee covers your entire family — no per-person fees, no matter how many members enroll.
programs.disclaimer: *Class schedules and availability subject to change.

about.title: About MyDojo
about.mission_desc: To empower individuals of all ages through martial arts, building confidence, discipline, and a lifelong love of fitness.
about.history_desc: MyDojo was founded with a simple belief: martial arts can change lives. What started as a small dojo has grown into a thriving community of students, families, and instructors united by a passion for martial arts.
about.subtitle: Empowering lives through the art of self-defense and fitness.
about.value_fun_desc: We believe learning should be enjoyable. Our classes are high-energy, engaging, and designed to keep students motivated.
about.value_fit_desc: Physical fitness is the foundation of a healthy life. Our programs improve strength, flexibility, and cardiovascular health.
about.value_strong_desc: Strength of body and mind. We teach mental fortitude, focus, and the resilience to overcome challenges.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers.
faq.q1: How old does my child need to be to start?
faq.a1: We accept students as young as 3 years old in our Little Ninjas program. There's no upper age limit — we have students in their 60s and beyond!
faq.q2: Do I need any prior experience?
faq.a2: Absolutely not! All of our programs are designed to welcome complete beginners. Our instructors will guide you every step of the way.
faq.q3: What should I wear to my first class?
faq.a3: Wear comfortable athletic clothing for your first class. Once enrolled, you'll receive your uniform (gi).
faq.q4: How often should I attend classes?
faq.a4: We recommend attending 2-3 times per week for optimal progress. However, even once a week will show results over time.
faq.a5: We offer flexible month-to-month memberships as well as discounted annual plans. No long-term contracts required.
faq.a6: Our programs start at $119/month. We also offer family discounts and a free trial class so you can try before you commit.
